title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Wipro

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Wipro
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
